description_long: This alcohol shop features a compact, open-air wooden kiosk design with a prominent rectangular canopy supported by sturdy posts. The front facade displays a large black and white sign reading '3 Cordilleras' above a bar counter, flanked by two racks filled with assorted bottles. The interior includes a central bar area with a tap system, wooden barrels used as decor or seating, and a branded circular floor mat. Overhead, a row of industrial-style black pendant lights illuminates the serving area. The structure is set on a raised wooden platform, with slatted woodwork providing partial enclosure and visual interest at the rear. The overall aesthetic combines rustic and industrial elements, creating a welcoming and functional space for serving alcoholic beverages in an urban environment.
description: A rustic, open-air wooden alcohol shop kiosk with a prominent branded sign, bottle racks, and industrial lighting, set on a raised platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the '3 Cordilleras' sign, bottle racks, bar counter, barrels, and branded floor mat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk, the bar counter, barrels, and the row of pendant lights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slatted wooden enclosure and the solid canopy, with minimal visible interior details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bar counter, bottle racks, barrels, and lighting from a different angle.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large rectangular black sign with white text '3 Cordilleras' and a circular logo, mounted above the bar counter on the front facade. The sign is made of a matte material, likely wood or metal, and is visually prominent.
attribute_advertisements_for_alcoholic_b: The '3 Cordilleras' branded sign and bottle racks with visible bottles serve as advertisements for alcoholic beverages, prominently displayed at the front of the kiosk.
attribute_architectural_style: The structure exhibits a rustic-industrial style, characterized by exposed wood, slatted panels, industrial pendant lighting, and open-air kiosk design.
